heldout_preposition_cases.sentence: The spare key was hidden [inside] the old lantern.
A wooden crate rested [beside] the north wall.
The map was folded [beneath] the captain's journal.
A narrow wire stretched [across] the wet courtyard.
The hikers moved [toward] the ridge before sunset.
The signal faded [beyond] the final checkpoint.
Rain tapped [against] the cabin window all night.
The children ran [around] the fountain in circles.
A small bench stood [near] the garden gate.
The truck rolled [past] the empty warehouse slowly.
Soft music echoed [throughout] the marble hall.
Two bicycles were left [outside] the bakery door.
